creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 175804
patch to releases and releng pages

This patch adds necessary information about 11.0R to the website.

while here, I propose deleting a stale paragraph about the support model.  A subsequent patch will rework that information on the Security page.

A quick note is added about the next release not having a fixed date yet.

Finally, a couple of missing links are added.
